headline: Williams (WMB) Eyes $5.5 Billion Momentum Midstream Deal In Major Pipeline Expansion
summary: Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire Momentum Midstream, a major natural gas pipeline operator. The potential deal would expand Williams Companies' pipeline network connecting the Haynesville shale to U.S. Gulf Coast export facilities. If completed, this would be one of the largest transactions in Williams Companies' history and could reshape its U.S. gas infrastructure footprint.
